title: Northwind Newsletter Design
summary: An email newsletter design project that supports the case for campaign-ready marketing execution.
challenge: Create a clear, branded newsletter layout that supports scannability and campaign communication.
approach: Focused on hierarchy, spacing, and modular content presentation.
Framed the piece as a campaign-support asset rather than only a visual exercise.
results: Reinforces Erroll’s fit for lifecycle marketing and campaign asset production.

sections.heading: Why it belongs here
paragraphs: Even though it is an older archive piece, this project directly supports the positioning around marketing design because email production is still a core deliverable for many growth teams.
